articles.title: IBM’s stock is having its worst day ever after the surprise release of an earnings miss
articles.description: IBM’s stock plunges after a preliminary release of profit and revenue that were well below expectations.

articles.title: Homes are getting more affordable. So how come you still can’t afford to buy one?

articles.title: Paychecks are rising faster than prices for a change — but when will consumers feel the relief?
articles.description: Wage growth in June outpaced inflation, after falling behind during April and May.

articles.title: Global oil prices on track to notch back-to-back rise, remain ‘tethered to the Hormuz narrative’
articles.description: Global oil prices Tuesday were on track to notch their largest two-day rise since mid-March, buoyed by further escalation in the U.S.-Iran conflict.

articles.title: ‘It’s heartbreaking’: My brother claimed Social Security at 70. He died from cancer after one payment. Why wait to claim?
articles.description: “I’ve always been a little skeptical of the government’s encouragement to delay claiming benefits.”

articles.description: The consumer price index in June was expected to increase 3.8% from a year ago.
